title: [codereview-1] cbor_put_tstr header_len+overrun fix: correctness, logic, off-by-one
description: Pass 1 review of edited cbor_put_tstr in coap_status.c:102-140. Verified header_len now matches encoding (1/2/3/5 bytes), 0x7a for >U16, u32 length bytes correct, >4GiB guard sets overflow. No P0-P1. No buffer overrun possible due to check_space. codereview
close_reason: cbor_put_tstr header_len+overrun fixed and reviewed: header_len matches encoding branches (1/2/3/5B), 0x7a for >0xffff, u32 length bytes correct BE, >4GiB guard, check_space prevents overrun. No P0-P1. Codereview pass complete. Commit faca2ac07
